problem: Find the sum of all positive integers n such that n^2 - 3n + 2 is a perfect square.
What is the remainder when 2^100 is divided by 7?
How many three-digit numbers have digits that sum to 10?
In a right triangle with legs of length 3 and 4, what is the length of the altitude to the hypotenuse?
What is the smallest prime factor of 2024?
Solve for x: 2^(x+1) = 16^(x-1)
How many diagonals does a convex octagon have?
What is the coefficient of x^3 in the expansion of (1+x)^6?
A circle has radius 5. What is the area of a sector with central angle 72 degrees?
Find the sum of the first 20 positive even integers.
What is the units digit of 7^2024?
If sin(θ) = 3/5 and θ is in the first quadrant, what is cos(2θ)?
How many ways can 8 people be arranged around a circular table?
What is the greatest common divisor of 252 and 180?
Find the area of the triangle with vertices at (0,0), (4,0), and (2,6).
What is the probability of rolling a sum of 7 with two fair dice?
Solve the system: x + y = 10, xy = 21. Find x^2 + y^2.
What is the sum of the interior angles of a regular hexagon?
How many factors does 72 have?
Find the equation of the line passing through (2,3) and (4,7).
What is the volume of a sphere with radius 3?
In how many ways can 5 people stand in a line if two particular people must not stand next to each other?
What is the 10th term of the arithmetic sequence: 3, 7, 11, 15, ...?
If log₂(x) = 5, what is log₄(x)?
What is the distance between the points (1,2) and (4,6)?
How many integers between 1 and 100 are divisible by 3 or 5?
Find the derivative of f(x) = x³ - 3x² + 2x at x = 2.
What is the sum of the geometric series: 1 + 1/2 + 1/4 + 1/8 + ...?
A regular polygon has exterior angles of 40°. How many sides does it have?
What is the remainder when 3^50 is divided by 8?
If tan(θ) = 2, what is sin(2θ)?
How many 4-digit numbers have all distinct digits?
Find the integral of ∫(2x + 3)dx from 0 to 2.
What is the minimum value of x² - 6x + 13?
In a group of 30 people, 18 play tennis and 20 play golf. How many play both if everyone plays at least one?
What is the area of a triangle with sides 13, 14, 15?
How many ways to choose 3 people from 10?
What is the complex conjugate of 3 + 4i?
If f(x) = 2x - 1, what is f⁻¹(3)?
What is the eccentricity of the ellipse x²/25 + y²/9 = 1?
How many positive divisors does 60 have?
Find the sum of the first 10 terms of the sequence: 2, 6, 18, 54, ...
What is the probability of drawing 2 aces from a standard deck?
Solve for x: √(x+5) = x - 1
What is the surface area of a cube with side length 4?
If A and B are independent events with P(A) = 0.3 and P(B) = 0.4, what is P(A ∩ B)?
Find the inverse of the matrix [[2, 1], [5, 3]].
What is the sum of all two-digit primes?
A cone has radius 3 and height 4. What is its volume?
How many subsets does a set with 6 elements have?
Find the limit: lim(x→0) (sin x)/x
What is the coefficient of x²y³ in (x+y)^5?
If z = 1 + i, what is |z|?
What is the sum of the roots of x³ - 6x² + 11x - 6 = 0?
How many edges does a complete graph with 5 vertices have?
Find the area between y = x² and y = x.
What is the period of sin(2x)?
In a leap year, what is the probability that a random day is in February?
What is the rank of the matrix [[1, 2], [2, 4]]?
How many integers satisfy |x - 3| < 5?
What is the sum of the first 100 positive integers?
Find the vertex of the parabola y = 2x² - 8x + 5.
What is the Euler totient function φ(12)?
How many ways to arrange the letters in 'STATISTICS'?
What is the equation of the circle with center (2, -3) and radius 5?
If sin(A) = 1/2 and A is acute, what is cos(A)?
What is the expected value when rolling a fair die?
Solve: 2^x = 3^(x-1)
What is the angle between the vectors [1, 0] and [1, 1]?
How many prime numbers are less than 50?
Find the length of the parametric curve x = t², y = t³ for t ∈ [0, 2].
What is the least common multiple of 12 and 18?
In a triangle with sides a=5, b=7, c=8, find cos(C).
What is the Taylor series expansion of e^x around 0 up to x³?
How many ways to distribute 10 identical balls into 4 distinct boxes?
What is the determinant of [[3, 1], [2, 4]]?
If f(x) = ln(x), what is f'(e)?
What is the sum of the series: Σ(1/2)^n for n=1 to ∞?
Find the number of triangles with integer sides and perimeter 12.
What is the standard deviation of {2, 4, 6, 8, 10}?
If det(A) = 5, what is det(2A) for a 3×3 matrix A?
What is the probability of exactly 2 heads in 4 coin flips?
Find the value of ∫₀^π sin(x)dx.
What is the 100th digit after the decimal in 1/7?

What is the radius of convergence of Σ(x^n)/n!?

What is the residue of f(z) = 1/(z²+1) at z = i?

What is the class equation for D₈?

What is the fundamental group of the torus S¹ × S¹?

What is the Hausdorff dimension of the Cantor set?
How many elements of order 2 are in GL₂(F₃)?
